description: Style NoteGear up this summer for the IPL with your favourite team's T-shirt. Sport this trendy T-shirt from nike and be true to your city!Product DetailsDeep sky blue T-shirt with a round neck, short sleeves, graphic print on chest, back and left sleeve Material and Care 100% cottonMachine wash cool with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleach or dry cleanTumble dry lowCool iron do not iron on decorations
